title: ChaosZPack Remastered: Structures ! [Watchtowers]
description: A Structure mod that will be Seperate from ChaosZPack Remastered that will come out in the Future
body:
🏚️ CHAOSZPACK REVAMPED: STRUCTURES! 🏚️

🛠️ Expansion Structures for the Apocalypse

ChaosZPack Structures is a brand new structure mod designed to complement your apocalyptic Minecraft experience. Developed by ChaosCraft_HD (Author) and maintained by Admany, this mod will bring a wealth of new, hand-crafted structures to your worlds - perfect for any survival, exploration, or apocalypse-themed modpack!

🌟 Current Status & Features

ChaosZPack Structures is currently Work-in-Progress and in its first release features a Watchtower for players to discover and loot. Even at this early stage, it makes a fantastic addition to any world in need of atmospheric, lore-rich ruins.

⚡ Planned Content

  • More Watchtower Variants
  • Radio Towers
  • Plane Crashes
  • Shipwrecks
  • A Prison inspired by TWD
  • And much more, stay tuned!

🔗 Dependencies

  • Create
  • Create Deco
  • Refurbished Furniture
  • Immersive Weathering
  • Doomsday Decoration
  • Berezka Library

Make sure to have these mods installed for the best experience!

⚖️ Usage Guidelines

© 2025 ChaosCraft_HD & Admany - All Rights Reserved

Modpack & Server Usage: For modpacks or servers with over 100,000 downloads, please reach out for permission to include this mod. We’re typically happy to grant permission – we just like to know where our work is being used!

Code Protection: Please respect that the code within this mod’s JAR file is protected by copyright. Rather than decompiling or modifying the code directly, we welcome collaboration! If you have ideas or want to contribute, please contact us directly.

Regarding ChaosZPack: This mod and its code are original works by ChaosCraft_HD and Admany. Any future collaborations or implementations require permission from the creators.

Smaller Projects: Feel free to include this mod in smaller modpacks and servers! Attribution to ChaosCraft_HD/BlackRift Studios is appreciated and helps support continued development.

Thank you for respecting these guidelines! 💜

✨ Why Add ChaosZPack Structures?

  • Hand-crafted structures to enhance exploration
  • Perfectly complements the future ChaosZPack Remastered
  • Designed for atmospheric, story-driven, or survival gameplay
  • Easy to add - just drop into your mods folder!

🌐 Community

Join us on Discord for news, feedback, and to shape the mod’s development:
BlackRift Studios Discord

👤 About the Team

Author: ChaosCraft_HD
Maintainer: Admany
We’re passionate about building immersive, performance-friendly mods for the Minecraft community. Your feedback, ideas, and bug reports help us improve - don’t hesitate to reach out!

ChaosZPack Structures • WiP Version • Created by ChaosCraft_HD • Maintained by Admany • BlackRift Studios
